title: Reply
description: An inbound reply to outreach, classified so the Reply Handling OS can route the next action. Unsubscribe / angry / bounce categories trigger immediate suppression. Positive replies route to the WhatsApp Post-Reply OS only after consent.

next_action.description: positive->discovery_invite, price_question->offer_card, send_more_info->proof_pack, wrong_person->referral_ask, unsubscribe->suppress, angry->apologize_suppress, bounce->suppress.

consent_to_whatsapp.description: True only if the prospect explicitly consented to WhatsApp follow-up.
